calendar.matters:
Petition Of Margaret Roth To Perpetuate Testimony Of Terry Roth By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David G. Arthur, Esq. specially appearing for Respondent and opposing party: Union Carbide
Michelle C. Jackson, Esq., specially appearing for Tecomseh Products Company

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner Margaret Roth's Motion To Perpetuate Testimony Of Terry Roth By Videotaped Deposition is denied. Late opposition has been considered. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. Reporter: Sheila Arceno, CSR# 13293
